case_title: GOMBERG, DAVID VS NATIONAL UNION FIRE INS.CO. OF PITTSBURGH, PA.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO CLAUDE VAN VILET REGIONAL VP NAT'L UNION FIRE INS. CO OF PITTSBURG RETURNED SIGNED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $667.14 FILED BY GOMBERG, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INS.CO. OF PITTSBURGH, PA. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOMBERG, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NATIONAL UNION FIRE INS.CO. OF PITTSBURGH, PA. THE PLAIN MEANING OF THE WARRANTY IS SUCH THAT IT DOES NOT APPLY TO SEAT LATCH RELEASES. SECTION OF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
